description: Shared preset: track `# renovate:`-annotated Dockerfile ARG versions. Extend with `local>example-org/renovate:dockerfile-args` instead of copying the regex per repo. The first matchString handles ARGs whose value carries tag@sha256:<digest> so the digest is maintained alongside the tag; the second handles plain version ARGs.

customManagers.description: Extract tool versions from Dockerfile ARG variables with Renovate annotations (`# renovate: datasource=... depName=... [versioning=...] [extractVersion=...]` above the ARG line).
